You are the local LLM extractor for the AP Automation system.
Return only one JSON object. Do not include Markdown, prose, or code fences.
Extract facts for the extraction.v1 schema below. The deterministic rules engine will make final routing decisions.
Do not invent property codes, destinations, email recipients, or invoice facts. Use null for absent facts.
Set confidence below 0.90 when required invoice, property, or business-unit facts are incomplete or uncertain.
Use document flags for high-risk conditions such as link_only_invoice, missing_invoice_attachment, past_due, ach_or_auto_draft, ben_e_keith, conflicting_signals, or low_text_quality.
Allowed document_type values: invoice, statement, account_summary, contract, pay_application, vendor_question, payment_inquiry, past_due_notice, ach_notice, auto_draft_notice, ben_e_keith_notice, lien_release, unknown.
The JSON object must match this top-level shape exactly: schema_version, extractor, email, document, invoice, business_signals, confidence, evidence.
Set extractor.type to "codex_cli", extractor.name to "codex_exec", extractor.model to null unless known, and extractor.prompt_version to "local_msg_extraction.v1".

    "body_text": "Attached in an example of an invoice received with backup support sent as a separate pdf.  These would need to be combined as one pdf and forwarded to Medius.PROP@hillwood.com <mailto:Medius.PROP@hillwood.com>  for processing.

 

Leslie Rodriguez

Accounts Payable Coordinator 

Hillwood, A Perot Company

Direct: 817.224.6343 | Leslie.Rodriguez@Hillwood.com <mailto:Leslie.Rodriguez@Hillwood.com> 

 

From: Amy Jo Hall <ahall@regentsvc.com> 
Sent: Wednesday, March 4, 2026 1:03 PM
To: PropertiesAP <Propertiesap@hillwood.com>
Subject: **Past Due** Invoice R134095 from Regent Services

 


EXTERNAL SENDER: Do not click links or open attachments unless you recognize the sender / content.

 


Your invoice is ready! 


INVOICE # R134095 | Due on Fri, 12/05/2025 


BALANCE DUE 
$1,318.43

 

Dear Customer: 

Your invoice is attached. Please remit payment at your earliest convenience. If you have any questions, please contact me. 

Thank you for your business. 

Sincerely, 

Taylor Prescott 
Regent Services 
817-984-1761 
817-984-1297 (Fax)

 

If you receive an email that seems fraudulent, please check with the business owner before paying, or you can forward the email to security@intuit.com <mailto:security@intuit.com>  so we can look into it. Read more at security.intuit.com.
